title: CCRB — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Civilian Complaint Review Board (CCRB) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the four CCRB Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), the Data Transparency Initiative dashboards on nyc.gov/site/ccrb, and the online complaint intake. Includes the NYC geography spine (borough / NYPD precinct), the CCRB accountability vocabulary (FADO categories, dispositions), and a reference to an accused police officer.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

FADOType.description: The NYC Charter category of misconduct within CCRB jurisdiction ('FADO Type') — Force, Abuse of Authority, Discourtesy, Offensive Language.

ComplaintDisposition.description: CCRB's overall disposition of a complaint ('CCRB Complaint Disposition').

AllegationDisposition.description: Disposition of a single allegation ('CCRB Allegation Disposition' / 'NYPD Allegation Disposition').

OfficerReference.description: A reference to an accused NYPD member of service by CCRB's numbering keys.

taxId.description: NYPD Tax ID number ('Tax ID') — CCRB's primary officer key.

rank.description: Rank at incident or current rank ('Officer Rank At Incident' / 'Current Rank').

command.description: Command at incident or current command ('Officer Command At Incident' / 'Current Command').

DemographicProfile.description: Demographic attributes carried for officers and for victims/alleged victims.

race.description: Race / ethnicity ('Officer Race' / 'Victim / Alleged Victim Race / Ethnicity').

ageRange.description: Age range at incident ('Victim/Alleged Victim Age Range At Incident').
